info.title: Chat9 Public Widget API
info.description: Public, no-auth API used by the embedded chat widget on customer websites. The widget identifies itself by the bot's `public_id` (a short string starting with `ch_` — the same value as `data-bot-id` in the embed snippet). All endpoints are rate-limited per visitor IP.

get.description: Returns 200 OK when the widget service is reachable.
Returns widget config (link safety labels, allowed domains).

post.description: Bootstrap a chat session for a visitor. Optionally accepts a server-signed `identity_token` to attach a verified end-user identity (identified session). Rate limit: 10 requests per minute per IP.

identity_token.description: Optional HMAC-SHA256 signed token issued by the customer's server.

400.description: Bot not available (e.g. OpenAI key missing)

post.summary: Send a chat message (Server-Sent Events stream)
post.description: Send a user message and receive the bot's answer as a Server-Sent Events stream. The response stream emits `data: {"type":"chunk","text":"..."}` events as the model streams, then a final `data: {"type":"done", ...}` event with the full text, sources, and chat_ended flag. Maximum message length is 1000 characters. Rate limit: 30 requests per minute per visitor IP.

message.description: User's question (max 1000 chars; longer messages are rejected).

200.description: SSE stream of chunk + done events

get.description: Return prior messages from the same `session_id` so the widget can rehydrate after a page reload. Rate limit: 30 requests per minute per IP.

post.summary: Manually escalate a session to a human
post.description: Create a support ticket from the widget. Returns the ticket number (e.g. `ESC-42`) which is also displayed to the user. Rate limit: 20 requests per minute per IP.

reason.description: Optional free-form reason from the user.

get.description: Returns the JavaScript loader served at https://<api-host>/embed.js. Embed it on your site with `<script src=".../embed.js" data-bot-id="..."></script>` to render the chat button.
